articles.title: Shiba Inu Burn Rate Accelerates By 3,000%, Will It Impact Price?
articles.description: The meme coin currently under the spotlight for its token-burning campaign hit a new burn rate high this Monday. Shiba Inu, the dog crypto, burned close to 200 million coins within the last 24 hours. According to SHIB Burn data, the burn rate of Shib tokens has spiked by about 3000% in the space of 1 day. Furthermore, most of the tokens sent to Shiba Inu’s burn wallet are from individual...

articles.title: Google Cloud Now Available to BNB Chain’s 1,300 Apps
articles.description: Google Cloud and Binances BNB Chain have partnered to help startups gain access to cloud computing services. Binance and Google are collaborating.According to a press release issued on September 14, BNB Chain and Google Cloud have formed a partnership to promote the development of Web3 and blockchain startups.Specifically, the partnership will see Binance's BNB Chain provide a portion of its...

articles.title: Tesla launches new Cyberwhistle that can only be bought using Dogecoin
articles.description: "Blow the whistle! But you must pay in Doge," says Tesla's CEO Elon Musk.

articles.title: SHIB Lead Dev Explains How Entire SHIB Supply Can Be Burned
articles.description: Shytoshi Kusama has shared plan that SHIB army needs to follow to burn SHIB supply

articles.title: Ethereum Classic hash rate shot up by 200% over last 30 days
articles.description: Ethereum Classic’s hash rate has surpassed 64 terahashes per second (TH/s), having grown more than 40% in September ahead of The Merge.

articles.title: The Merge Week: Less Than 24 Hours Till Ethereum’s PoS Upgrade, How Are Crypto Exchanges Prepared?
articles.description: Summary: Major crypto exchanges like Binance, Coinbase, and FTX released their operational plans for the merge. While some plans differ, most platforms intend to support Ethereum’s switch from proof-of-work to proof-of-stake. The merge is less than 24 hours away at press time. Developers expect the Paris update to go live and signal the full upgrade between late Wednesday and early Thursday this...

articles.title: Here’s What’s Ahead for XRP, Cosmos and Two Additional Altcoins, According to Analyst Michaël van de Poppe
articles.description: A popular crypto trader is mapping out what’s in store for a handful of altcoins including XRP and Cosmos (ATOM) as the digital asset markets witness another sell-off event. Michaël van de Poppe tells his 627,100 Twitter followers that the seventh-largest crypto asset is now hovering at a price level that’s favorable for XRP bulls. […]

articles.title: Do Kwon’s arrest: South Korea considers Interpol red notice and passport revoke
articles.description: South Korean authorities are seeking Terra founder Do Kwon's arrest. The Singapore resident may soon have his passport revoked.

articles.title: DOGE Days Are Over as Elon Musk Launches Tesla ‘Cyberwhistle’
articles.description: Elon Musk has invited his Twitter followers to “blow the whistle,” with the launch of a limited-edition Tesla Cyberwhistle, available only to customers willing to fork over 1,000 Dogecoin (DOGE) for the toy.

articles.title: Terra Plummets as Do Kwon Faces Arrest in South Korea
articles.description: According to the prosecutors office, all six wanted individuals from Terraform Labs currently reside in Singapore. The law is finally catching up with Do Kwon.A Wednesday report from South Korean news outlet Chosun Ilbo has revealed that a Seoul court had issued arrest warrants for the Terra founder and five other individuals. The warrants alleged that Kwon and his accomplices violated Korean...

articles.title: Court issues an arrest warrant against Terra’s Do Kwon as LUNA nosedives 40% in 2 hours
articles.description: Four months after the widely-publicized collapse of the Terra (LUNA) platform and its TerraUSD (UST) stablecoin that initiated a chain... Continue reading

articles.title: Terra LUNA & LUNC Crash After South Korea Issues Warrant for Do Kwon
articles.description: According to a text message from the prosecutor's office, the Seoul court has issued a warrant for the arrest of Terra co-founder Do Kwon and five additional people.

articles.title: South Korean Prosecutors Issue Do Kwon Arrest Warrant - Latest
articles.description: South Korean prosecutors have issued an arrest warrant for Do Kwon (real named Kwon Do-hyeong), the co-founder and CEO of Terraform Labs – the firm behind the Terra ecosystem coins LUNA and LUNC. [Updated at UTC 09:03] Kwon is currently residing in Singapore. According to Digital Today and Chosun Ilbo, South Korean prosecutors may seek aid from Interpol in their efforts to arrest the CEO....

articles.title: Treasury to allow users to recover Tornado Cash funds
articles.description: Over a month after placing the Ethereum coin-mixing tool Tornado Cash under sanctions, the U.S. Treasury Department announced a way for Tornado Cash users to recover their funds on Tuesday. See related article: Tether says didn’t freeze sanctioned Tornado Cash addresses so as to not interfere in investigations Fast facts The new guidance provides a […]
